data.title: Ethereum Raises Gas Limit to 60M, Unlocking Biggest Capacity in Years
data.description:
Ethereum has raised its block gas limit to a four-year high of 60 million, significantly boosting base-layer capacity as validators unite to increase throughput.

The post Ethereum Raises Gas Limit to 60M, Unlocking Biggest Capacity in Years first appeared on Ecoinimist.

source: https://ecoinimist.com/2025/11/27/ethereum-raises-gas-limit-to-60-m/?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=ethereum-raises-gas-limit-to-60-m

data.title: Bitcoin Price Movements Could Trigger Significant Liquidations
data.description: According to ChainCatcher, data from Coinglass indicates that if Bitcoin's price falls below $86,801, the cumulative liquidation intensity of long positions on major centralized exchanges will reach $1.846 billion. Conversely, if Bitcoin surpasses $95,541, the cumulative liquidation intensity of short positions on these exchanges will amount to $1.638 billion.

data.title: Warning: New Chrome Extension Drains Solana Traders – 0.05% Stolen Per Swap
data.description:
Cybersecurity firm Socket warns that chrome extension called Crypto Copilot injects hidden transactions into Solana swaps, skimming 0. 05% per trade while appearing legitimate.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/crypto-copilot-solana-extension-hidden-fee/
